title: DTE Energy: Slow And Steady Dividend Grower
text: DTE Energy was holding up well with the rest of the utility space before the latest declines pulled the sector down. Utilities aren't necessarily cheap yet, but their defensive nature can be what investors look for during uncertain times.

title: DTE Energy's (DTE) Combined-Cycle Power Plant Starts Operation
text: DTE Energy (DTE) announces that its Blue Water Energy Center, a combined-cycle natural gas-fired power plant, has commenced its operations in Michigan.

title: DTE Energy's (DTE) Combined-Cycle Power Plant Starts Operation
text: DTE Energy (DTE) announces that its Blue Water Energy Center, a combined-cycle natural gas-fired power plant, has commenced its operations in Michigan.

title: DTE Energy's Blue Water Energy Center begins commercial operation
text: State-of-art plant will provide cleaner, reliable, affordable power for 850,000 homes and is the company's single largest step in reducing carbon emissions to date State-of-art plant will provide cleaner, reliable, affordable power for 850,000 homes and is the company's single largest step in reducing carbon emissions to date

title: AEP or DTE: Which Is a Better Utility Power Stock to Pick?
text: At present, DTE Energy (DTE) appears to be a better choice in the utility space compared with American Electric Power (AEP).
